EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPolycurve2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that extend IPolycurve with additional splitting and densification methods.

[Guid("F4737332-F6B7-11D3-9F6A-00C04F6BDD7F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPolycurve2 : IPolycurve, ICurve, IGeometry

Methods

Densify(double, double) 

void Densify(double maxSegmentLength, double maxDeviation)

Parameters

maxSegmentLength double
maxDeviation double

DensifyByAngle(double, double)

Converts this polycurve into a piecewise linear approximation of itself. Vertices are introduced at points where the included angle between tangents at those point is maxAngleDeviation.

void DensifyByAngle(double maxSegmentLength, double maxAngleDeviation)

Parameters

maxSegmentLength double
maxAngleDeviation double

SplitAtDistances(int, ref double, bool, bool)

Introduces new vertices into this polyline at specified distances from the beginning of the polyline.

IEnumSplitPoint SplitAtDistances(int distanceCount, ref double distances, bool asRatios, bool createParts)

Parameters

distanceCount int
distances double
asRatios bool
createParts bool

IEnumSplitPoint
